description: A graphic with a red banner reading 'IMPORTANT REMINDER' and a blue subhead 'GREENCARD HOLDERS & LAWFUL PERMANENT RESIDENTS'. Black body text quotes a requirement that aliens 18 and over carry their alien registration documentation at all times, warning of misdemeanor and fines, citing Section 1304(e) of Title 8 of the U.S. Code. A green card image and a U.S. Customs and Border Protection logo appear at the bottom.
notable_text: IMPORTANT REMINDER; GREENCARD HOLDERS & LAWFUL PERMANENT RESIDENTS; Section 1304(e) of Title 8 of the U.S. Code; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
